name: Datwyler Holding AG
summary: D√É¬§twyler Holding AG manufactures and sells elastomer components for health care, mobility, oil and gas, and food and beverage industries worldwide. It operates through Healthcare Solutions and Industrial Solutions segments. The Healthcare Solutions segment offers rubber components for prefilled syringes, pens, and injection systems; components and closures for injectable drugs in vials; and rubber components for blood collection systems, IV administration sets, disposable syringes, diagnostics and medical devices, etc. The Industrial Solutions segment products include electromobility solutions, active assistance and safety systems, brake systems, fuel and engine management, exhaust gas aftertreatment, and sealing components for upstream systems, power tools, water, and process industries. It is also involved in the online distribution of components/automation, single-board computer, power supply, measurement equipment, tools and soldering, home and security, network technology, computing, and communication and office products, as well as TV, video, and multimedia products. The company was founded in 1915 and is based in Altdorf, Switzerland. D√É¬§twyler Holding AG is a subsidiary of Pema Holding AG.
